title: Clavicular’s daily looksmaxxing dr*g stack sparks alarm as doctor warns of serious health risks
summary_full: Looksmaxxing influencer Braden Peters revealed the daily drug cocktail he uses to pursue his ideal physique, including testosterone, retatrutide, and other supplements. During an interview with The New York Times, he described the regimen as part of his “biohacking” lifestyle. However, doctor Suzanne Wylie warned such combinations could pose serious health risks.
